feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: on the skyline
entry.summary:
Author: sterek24 (mooncry89)

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,025Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 21

Summary: Following the fall of the Nogitsune (for the last time, if everything actually worked out in Stiles's favor), he's still having some strange dreams and there's new bad guys stumbling into Beacon Hills all the time. The Hale pack will have to work together to figure out what the newest creature feature is and just why Stiles seems to be at the middle of it all, because isn't he always?

entry.title: Titanium and Iron
entry.summary:
Author: FireFlareC

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,068Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 827

Summary: Life seemed to happen to James Buchanan on a Tuesday, a pregnant whirlwind that would become his best friend, an eccentric billionaire that would become more and a baby with his mother's brown eyes but James jawline and pale skin.By the time Steve was found and wakes up in New York, James was marking yet another sophomore essay on Russian literature where they had clearly not even read the sparknotes properly.His husband was fighting verbally with Fury about not wanting to be an Avenger because they had a kid at home and Tony wanted to be able to attend lacrosse matches and Ballet recitals in peace.See what happens when Tony Stark doesn't need to make the Avengers his family because he already has one. His husband looks uncannily like Bucky Barnes even though no one can prove he isn't from North Cali.

entry.summary:

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,205Chapters: 6/8Kudos: 77

entry.title: you just can't stop leaving, can you?
entry.summary:
Author: lonelyBoneflower

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,093Chapters: 4/10Kudos: 16

Summary: He was a stranger. Just some sullen guy we ran into in the woods while looking for the inhaler my best friend relied on as if it were his very lifeline. And then, one day, we stood side by side, as if it were the most natural thing in the world. Derek was a stranger, yet when he stood with us, it felt entirely natural. Perhaps, from the very beginning, my heart had recognized him as a man worthy of trust—even if my mind was much slower to catch up to that truth. After the events of the movie, Stiles returns to town. [Alternate story for Teen Wolf The Movie]

entry.title: Only When It's You
entry.summary:
Author: MystikCeleste

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,052Chapters: 12/39Kudos: 86

Summary: A plan that will bring together the Supernatural world of the West Coast and the Shadow World of the East Coast. Two brothers that don't know the other exists. Two groups of warriors fighting the same war on opposite sides of the country. Warriors that should know each other, but don’t. It’s time for them to meet.

entry.title: Every Flavor of You
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 63,817Chapters: 30/45Kudos: 58

Summary: Derek Hale is a high school student who does his best to keep to himself. Until, he ends up as Stiles Stilinski's lab partner. Derek is an unmovable object, but Stiles is an unstoppable force, and their meeting has consequences across the multiverse. This story is a love letter to Sterek Fan Fiction. It imagines that every world from every Sterek fic is real and asks what would it be like if Stiles and Derek could travel to at least some of those worlds. This is a multiverse story. There is (temporary) major character death, and universes where minor characters have long been dead. There are a lot of stopovers into non-graphic portrayals of lots of different classic AUs. This includes a brief stop in an A/B/O AU where there is brief mpreg. There are lots of other AUs they will stop in, but I wanted to list those two things in particular in case they squick anyone out so badly that even non-graphic representations of them are too much. This story was originally my 2025 NaNoWriMo project, posted on my Tumblr. It is now complete and fully edited for AO3. The essence of the story hasn't changed, but I had to do a lot of pacing and characterization edits that weren't possible at the speed of NaNo.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.summary:
Author: Sivan325

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 656Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 26

Stiles was sitting in the bar, staring at the half glass of whiskey and have a bottle half opened.

entry.title: All Hale Caffeine - Book 2
entry.summary:
Author: Molly_Is_A_Fangirl

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,377Chapters: 7/18Kudos: 78

Summary: Kate Argent is dead. Victoria Argent is locked up for life. But Gerard's out on the prowl, bloodthirsty for revenge and there is a Kanima running around town killing people, seemingly at random. With the help of the magic councils, can Chris and Allison trick Gerard into defeat? More importantly, will Chris be able to move past what he's done?While the pack races to figure out who the Kanima is and Stiles attempts to control his ever-growing magic, Gerard Argent looms closer and closer, threatening to unravel the pack and the happiness they have found. Coffee Shop AU Rewrite of Season 2. Please read Book 1 first, to understand what is going on.

entry.summary:
Author: dd0g90

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,535Chapters: 12/19Kudos: 112

Summary: Stiles finds out his husband Derek has been having an affair with his father. He goes five years without running into his old pack. That is until Theo Raekin follows a familiar sent at a work site he's doing construction on.

entry.title: Threshold of the Void
entry.summary:
Author: Infernos

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 71,589Chapters: 9/18Kudos: 8

Summary: The Druid Council needs Stiles's help. Eight hundred years ago, druids made a catastrophic mistake, creating Tairseach Folús, a dimensional entity that feeds on supernatural life force. After devastating losses, seventeen druids sacrificed themselves to create a prison outside of our reality where the entity would be contained forever. Seventy-five years ago, a rogue druid discovered records of the prison and relocated it, anchoring it to the ley lines beneath San Francisco, where it began to degrade. The Councils formed a coalition with other supernaturals to reinforce the seals, but in this reality, those seals won't last. Now, a vengeful hunter family has allied with the druid and his followers. They intend to shatter the prison during the autumn equinox, bind the monster to their will, and use it to systematically wipe out the supernaturals. Stiles has eighteen days to stop them and find a way to send Tairseach back where it came from, before it consumes every supernatural being on the West Coast...and beyond

entry.title: If at first you don't succeed-Get you a fairy
entry.summary:
Author: A_rnie

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,255Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 40

Summary: "Stiles, you're amazing. Truly. But you're too young for me." Stiles was nothing if not persistent. The next year, he showed up at Christmas with a pie and a more articulate argument about maturity, life experience, and the legal definition of adulthood. Too young.   The year after that, he brought a PowerPoint presentation.   Too young.   By year four, Derek had started looking resigned before Stiles even opened his mouth, but still: "Amazing, too young" became something of a Christmas tradition, like ugly sweaters and Scott's inexplicable desire to mistletoe everyone. "I'm going to wear him down," Stiles announced at year five's rejection, clutching his chest dramatically. "One day. One day he'll realize that our love is destined, written in the stars—" "Derek literally bit you last month," Lydia pointed out. "That was a love bite! In werewolf culture, that's basically a marriage proposal!" "Stiles, it was on your ankle." "It was symbolic!"

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: He can't be dead
entry.summary:
Author: dromlex

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,317Chapters: 3/20Kudos: 45

Summary: After Derek Hale's death, Eli calls Stiles Stilinski. He doesn't remember his face, but he knows his name from the countless stories he's heard throughout his life. Stiles returns to Beacon Hills with a secret. A secret that, when the grief becomes too much, will bring Derek Hale back to life.

entry.title: Neal's Therapist
entry.summary:
Author: Tankeika

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 295,203Chapters: 21/22Kudos: 29

Summary: Neal Caffrey is picked up from prison by Peter to begin their work together. It goes well, at first. Until a few weeks in when Neal makes a run for it for the first time, cutting his anklet, unknowingly giving the now divorced, Peter Burke, the perfect opportunity to finally enact his long awaited plan. For those here for the Derek/Stiles tag, they're introduced in chapter 9! Sorry it took so long, and thanks for your patience!!!! ❤️

entry.summary:
Author: AnachronisticFruit

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,286Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 89

entry.title: Stolen Bonds
entry.summary:
Author: Warner_Azer_BBG

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,285Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 45

Summary: Derek Hale is looking for his mate, when he gets a call from his sister, but when he finds her, he sees a dead body of the one last sibling he had left, but he found who he was originally looking for.Stiles has been having terrifying dreams or visions, for over a month of a creature, that kills innocent people, and he can tell the creature wants something from him, but it’s not what he expects.Scott has been worried about his best friend, but one night he goes into the woods and gets bitten by a wolf, but he didn’t know that. He doesn’t understand what is going on with him or his best friend.Peter Hale had bitten Scott in the woods not long ago, but he found someone much more interesting. Stiles Stilinski. Peter figures out that Stiles is Derek’s mate, but what he didn’t expect was that Stiles was his mate as well. This changes Peter’s whole path of his plan. His goal is to now, make Stiles his mate before Derek even gets the chance. No matter the consequences.

entry.title: Rust, Dust, and Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Dino_Laurus_Rex

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,924Chapters: 18/75Kudos: 36

Summary: Seven years of unspoken words, hidden truths, and a bond forged in the shadows of Beacon Hills. ​Now, hidden away in a secluded bunker, Stiles Stilinski is completely on his own, carrying a secret pregnancy that connects him forever to the Hale lineage. As he looks back on the chaotic history that brought him here, he prepares for the hardest choice of his life—and the ultimate sacrifice made out of love. _______ Or just my version of the sterek ship.

entry.title: Surrounded by darkness
entry.summary:
Author: Marlowe89

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,838Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 28

Summary: I would like to point out that English is not my native language.After the fight with Donovan, Stiles falls with him and loses his sight. Scott and the pack turn their backs on him, believing Theo's lies. Theo actually wants nothing more than to push them away so he can have the boy all to himself. Stiles is depressed and doesn't know what to do with his life. All his dreams have vanished, and now he must accept his new condition. Will anyone help him?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski
  • Stiles Stilinski

  • Scott McCall (Teen Wolf)
